name: GYATM Dragon Edition
short_description: You are the first person on Mars. You will need to establish a base, mine resources, and build everything the colonists will need to survive. It's one person against a harsh and unforgiving planet where everything we take for granted is in short supply.
detailed_description:
You are the first person on Mars. You will need to establish a base, mine resources, and build everything the colonists will need to survive.
It's one person against a harsh and unforgiving planet where everything we take for granted is in short supply.
The colony ship is on the way. Thousands of lives depend on you!
about_the_game:
You are the first person on Mars. You will need to establish a base, mine resources, and build everything the colonists will need to survive.
It's one person against a harsh and unforgiving planet where everything we take for granted is in short supply.
The colony ship is on the way. Thousands of lives depend on you!
supported_languages:
English*, Norwegian, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
